name: Seven Step Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice three pounds of venison into strips about 1/8 inch thick to ensure total saturation of the meat while it's marinating.
2. Partially freeze beforehand to aid in slicing thin.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
4. Stir this mixture well with a spoon to dissolve all of the soluble ingredients.
5. Place the strips of meat in the marinade, ensuring they are completely submerged.
6. Marinate overnight, turning if necessary.
7. Lay marinated meat strips on an oven rack.
8. Cook for 6 to 8 (6 is better) at 150 degrees Fahrenheit until crispier. The longer they bake, the crisper they become.
9. Store finished jerky in zip-lock bags or other airtight containers to seal in freshness. Jerky will keep up to two years.
